scene.description: A vibrant and modern logo featuring a central i character formed by interconnected 3D cuboid shapes, surrounded by four other gradient-colored cuboids containing white outline icons. Decorative lines and dots extend dynamically from the cuboid cluster, creating a sense of connectivity. No wordmark or text at the bottom; only the graphic mark on a clean white background.

background.description: A plain, solid white background providing a clean canvas for the logo.

elements.description: The main vertical body of the 'i' character, rendered as a faceted 3D rectangular prism. It exhibits a blue gradient from darker shades at the bottom to lighter shades at the top-right face.
elements.details: Composed of multiple planar surfaces creating an isometric 3D effect, forming the base and stem of the 'i'.

elements.description: The 'dot' of the 'i' character, a small 3D cube positioned directly above and slightly connected to the central vertical bar. It features a blue gradient.
elements.details: A small isometric cuboid, serving as the dot of the 'i'.

elements.description: An isometric 3D cuboid positioned above and slightly behind the 'i' dot, connecting to the central blue structure. It features a blue gradient.
elements.details: One of the six cuboids forming the hexagonal cluster around the 'i', integrated into the central blue element.

elements.description: An isometric 3D cuboid positioned below and slightly behind the base of the 'i' vertical bar, connecting to the central blue structure. It features a blue gradient.
elements.details: One of the six cuboids forming the hexagonal cluster around the 'i', integrated into the central blue element.

elements.description: An isometric 3D cuboid positioned to the top-left of the central blue structure. It displays a warm gradient from orange to pinkish-red.
elements.details: Part of the outer cluster of cuboids, exhibiting multiple colored facets.

elements.description: An isometric 3D cuboid positioned to the top-right of the central blue structure. It displays a warm gradient from orange to pinkish-red.
elements.details: Part of the outer cluster of cuboids, exhibiting multiple colored facets.

elements.description: An isometric 3D cuboid positioned to the bottom-left of the central blue structure. It displays a cool gradient from teal to lime green.
elements.details: Part of the outer cluster of cuboids, exhibiting multiple colored facets.

elements.description: An isometric 3D cuboid positioned to the bottom-right of the central blue structure. It displays a warm gradient from orange to pinkish-red.
elements.details: Part of the outer cluster of cuboids, exhibiting multiple colored facets.

elements.description: White outline icon of a T-shirt, positioned centrally on the visible front face of the top-left cuboid (id 5).
elements.details: Simple, clean line art representing clothing or apparel.

elements.description: White outline icon of an open book, positioned centrally on the visible front face of the top-right cuboid (id 6).
elements.details: Simple, clean line art depicting two open pages, representing knowledge or information.

elements.description: White outline icon of a classic milk bottle with a cap, positioned centrally on the visible front face of the bottom-left cuboid (id 7).
elements.details: Simple, clean line art representing liquids or dairy products.

elements.description: White outline icon of a gear or cogwheel, positioned centrally on the visible front face of the bottom-right cuboid (id 8).
elements.details: Simple, clean line art representing settings, mechanics, or industry.

elements.description: Two dynamic, wavy dashed lines in shades of green extending from the left side of the cuboid cluster.
elements.details: Thin lines with rounded ends, suggesting connectivity, data flow, or dynamism.

elements.description: Two dynamic, wavy dashed lines in shades of orange extending from the right side of the cuboid cluster.
elements.details: Thin lines with rounded ends, suggesting connectivity, data flow, or dynamism.

elements.description: Two dynamic, wavy dashed lines in shades of blue extending from the bottom-right side of the cuboid cluster.
elements.details: Thin lines with rounded ends, suggesting connectivity, data flow, or dynamism.

elements.description: Three small, solid circular dots in green, accompanying the green wavy lines on the left.
Two small, solid circular dots in orange, accompanying the orange wavy lines on the right.
Two small, solid circular dots in blue, accompanying the blue wavy lines on the bottom-right.
A soft, diffused drop shadow beneath the entire cuboid graphic cluster, adding depth.
elements.details: Subtle light grey shadow extending to the bottom and right.
